metadata.name: GoDa漫画
metadata.description: GoDa漫画(G站) - 提供韩漫、国漫、日漫等多种漫画资源
metadata.author: ManXia Team

network.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; Pixel 7) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

actions.code: (() => { const results = []; const seen = new Set(); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/manga/"]').forEach(a => { const href = a.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/manga\/([^\/\s?#]+)$/); if (!m || seen.has(m[1])) return; seen.add(m[1]); const img = a.querySelector('img'); const title = a.textContent?.trim() || a.getAttribute('title') || ''; const cover = img?.getAttribute('src') || img?.getAttribute('data-src') || ''; if (title && title.length > 1 && title.length < 100) { results.push({ id: m[1], title: title, cover: cover }); } }); return JSON.stringify(results); })();

(() => { const results = []; const seen = new Set(); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/manga/"]').forEach(a => { const href = a.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/manga\/([^\/\s?#]+)$/); if (!m || seen.has(m[1])) return; seen.add(m[1]); const img = a.querySelector('img'); const title = a.textContent?.trim() || a.getAttribute('title') || ''; const cover = img?.getAttribute('src') || img?.getAttribute('data-src') || ''; if (title && title.length > 1 && title.length < 100) { results.push({ id: m[1], title: title, cover: cover }); } }); return JSON.stringify(results); })();

(() => { const results = []; const seen = new Set(); document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/manga/"]').forEach(a => { const href = a.getAttribute('href') || ''; const m = href.match(/\/manga\/([^\/\s?#]+)$/); if (!m || seen.has(m[1])) return; seen.add(m[1]); const img = a.querySelector('img'); const title = a.textContent?.trim() || a.getAttribute('title') || ''; const cover = img?.getAttribute('src') || img?.getAttribute('data-src') || ''; if (title && title.length > 1 && title.length < 100) { results.push({ id: m[1], title: title, cover: cover }); } }); return JSON.stringify(results); })();

(() => { const clean = (v) => String(v||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const h1 = document.querySelector('h1'); let title = h1 ? clean(h1.textContent||'') : ''; const ogTitle = document.querySelector('meta[property="og:title"]'); if (ogTitle && !title) title = clean(ogTitle.getAttribute('content')||'').replace(/-G站漫畫.*$/, '').trim(); const ogImage = document.querySelector('meta[property="og:image"]'); let cover = ogImage ? ogImage.getAttribute('content')||'' : ''; if (!cover) { const img = document.querySelector('img[src*="cover"], img[src*="baozimh"]'); if (img) cover = img.getAttribute('src')||''; } let author = ''; const bodyText = document.body.innerText || ''; const authorPatterns = [/作者[：:]\s*([^\n,，]{2,20})/, /原著[：:]\s*([^\n,，]{2,20})/]; for (const p of authorPatterns) { const m = bodyText.match(p); if (m) { author = clean(m[1]).split(/\s/)[0]; break; } } let status = '未知'; if (title.includes('完結') || title.includes('完结') || bodyText.includes('完結') || bodyText.includes('完结')) status = '已完结'; else if (bodyText.includes('連載中') || bodyText.includes('连载中')) status = '连载中'; const ogDesc = document.querySelector('meta[property="og:description"]'); let description = ogDesc ? clean(ogDesc.getAttribute('content')||'').substring(0, 500) : ''; title = title.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); title = title.replace(/\s*(連載中|连载中|完結|完结|已完结)\s*$/g, '').trim(); return JSON.stringify({ title: title || '未知标题', cover: cover, author: author || '未知', status: status, description: description }); })();

getMangaDetailWithChapters.description: 获取漫画详情和章节列表

actions.code: (() => { const clean = (v) => String(v||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const h1 = document.querySelector('h1'); let title = h1 ? clean(h1.textContent||'') : ''; const ogTitle = document.querySelector('meta[property="og:title"]'); if (ogTitle && !title) title = clean(ogTitle.getAttribute('content')||'').replace(/-G站漫畫.*$/, '').trim(); const ogImage = document.querySelector('meta[property="og:image"]'); let cover = ogImage ? ogImage.getAttribute('content')||'' : ''; if (!cover) { const img = document.querySelector('img[src*="cover"], img[src*="baozimh"]'); if (img) cover = img.getAttribute('src')||''; } let author = ''; const bodyText = document.body.innerText || ''; const authorPatterns = [/作者[：:]\s*([^\n,，]{2,20})/, /原著[：:]\s*([^\n,，]{2,20})/]; for (const p of authorPatterns) { const m = bodyText.match(p); if (m) { author = clean(m[1]).split(/\s/)[0]; break; } } let status = '未知'; if (title.includes('完結') || title.includes('完结') || bodyText.includes('完結') || bodyText.includes('完结')) status = '已完结'; else if (bodyText.includes('連載中') || bodyText.includes('连载中')) status = '连载中'; const ogDesc = document.querySelector('meta[property="og:description"]'); let description = ogDesc ? clean(ogDesc.getAttribute('content')||'').substring(0, 500) : ''; title = title.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); title = title.replace(/\s*(連載中|连载中|完結|完结|已完结)\s*$/g, '').trim(); return JSON.stringify({ title: title || '未知标题', cover: cover, author: author || '未知', status: status, description: description }); })();

window.__godaChapters = null; (function() { var el = document.getElementById('mangachapters'); if (!el) { window.__godaChapters = '[]'; return; } var mid = el.getAttribute('data-mid'); if (!mid) { window.__godaChapters = '[]'; return; } (async function() { try { var resp = await fetch('https://api-get-v3.mgsearcher.com/api/manga/get?mid=' + mid, {cache:'no-cache'}); var json = await resp.json(); if (!json || !json.status || !json.data || !json.data.chapters) { window.__godaChapters = '[]'; return; } var slug = json.data.slug || ''; var chapters = json.data.chapters.map(function(ch) { return { id: slug + '/' + (ch.attributes ? ch.attributes.slug : ''), url: '/manga/' + slug + '/' + (ch.attributes ? ch.attributes.slug : ''), title: (ch.attributes ? ch.attributes.title : '') || 'Chapter', date: (ch.attributes ? ch.attributes.updatedAt : '') || '' }; }); window.__godaChapters = JSON.stringify(chapters); } catch(e) { window.__godaChapters = '[]'; } })(); })(); 'ASYNC_STARTED';
actions.description: 通过API获取全部章节列表
等待API返回全部章节数据

actions.code: window.__godaChapters = null; (function() { var el = document.getElementById('mangachapters'); if (!el) { window.__godaChapters = '[]'; return; } var mid = el.getAttribute('data-mid'); if (!mid) { window.__godaChapters = '[]'; return; } (async function() { try { var resp = await fetch('https://api-get-v3.mgsearcher.com/api/manga/get?mid=' + mid, {cache:'no-cache'}); var json = await resp.json(); if (!json || !json.status || !json.data || !json.data.chapters) { window.__godaChapters = '[]'; return; } var slug = json.data.slug || ''; var chapters = json.data.chapters.map(function(ch) { return { id: slug + '/' + (ch.attributes ? ch.attributes.slug : ''), url: '/manga/' + slug + '/' + (ch.attributes ? ch.attributes.slug : ''), title: (ch.attributes ? ch.attributes.title : '') || 'Chapter', date: (ch.attributes ? ch.attributes.updatedAt : '') || '' }; }); window.__godaChapters = JSON.stringify(chapters); } catch(e) { window.__godaChapters = '[]'; } })(); })(); 'ASYNC_STARTED';
actions.description: 通过API获取全部章节列表
等待API返回全部章节数据

actions.code: window.__godaPages = null; (function() { var el = document.getElementById('chapterContent'); if (!el) { window.__godaPages = '[]'; return; } var ms = el.getAttribute('data-ms'); var cs = el.getAttribute('data-cs'); if (!ms || !cs) { window.__godaPages = '[]'; return; } (async function() { try { var resp = await fetch('https://api-get-v3.mgsearcher.com/api/chapter/getinfo?m=' + ms + '&c=' + cs, {cache:'no-cache'}); var json = await resp.json(); if (!json || !json.status || !json.data || !json.data.info || !json.data.info.images) { window.__godaPages = '[]'; return; } var imgs = json.data.info.images; var line = imgs.line; var base = line === 2 ? 'https://f40-1-4.g-mh.online' : 'https://t40-1-4.g-mh.online'; var pages = (imgs.images || []).map(function(img, i) { return {index: i, url: base + img.url}; }); window.__godaPages = JSON.stringify(pages); } catch(e) { window.__godaPages = '[]'; } })(); })(); 'ASYNC_STARTED';
